title: Build swift-traffic-analyzer-cli — Phase C of scaffold-app-from-web pipeline
description: Swift-pure traffic analysis CLI consuming HAR-like JSON from Phase B (swift-http-traffic-capture-cli). FoundationModels session reads traffic.json + auth.json; identifies endpoint groups (search, detail, list, mutate), auth flow type (none/cookie/oauth/bearer-token), payload shapes per endpoint, pagination patterns, rate limit hints. Emits Swift @Generable struct definitions for each distinct payload shape (using retail-schemas conventions). Emits endpoint catalog (endpoints.json) with HTTP method, path, auth requirement, request payload schema ref, response payload schema ref, sample payload. Output consumed by Phase D (codegen). FoundationModels session uses on-device Apple model per substrate doctrine.
